summary: Tested 3 bug fixes: 1) NotificationBell mobile responsiveness - PASS, 2) Task contact_events in timeline - PASS, 3) Task notification links with taskId/taskTitle - PASS. Backend: 5/5 tests passed. Frontend: Task banner and notification dropdown verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NotificationBell dropdown uses Math.min(380, window.innerWidth - 32) for mobile-responsive width at line 311
VERIFIED: POST /api/tasks/{user_id} with contact_id creates task_created contact_event at lines 284-299 in tasks.py
VERIFIED: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events returns task_created events with icon='checkbox-outline' and color='#FF9500' at lines 209-212 in contact_events.py
VERIFIED: /api/notification-center task links include taskId and taskTitle query params at lines 107-109 in notifications_center.py
VERIFIED: Contact detail page shows 'PENDING TASK' orange banner when taskTitle is in URL params at lines 2903-2920 in [id].tsx
VERIFIED: Task banner has dismiss button (data-testid='task-banner-dismiss') and correctly dismisses when clicked

VERIFIED: Event labels are centralized in utils/event_types.py with task_created='Task Created', task_completed='Task Completed', lead_reassigned='Lead Reassigned', sms_failed='SMS Failed', email_failed='Email Failed'
seed_data_creation: Created test task (TEST_TASK_20260308151842) for contact 69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working. NotificationBell dropdown is mobile-responsive (tested on 390px and 320px viewports). Task creation for contacts creates task_created contact_events that appear in timeline with orange checkbox icon. Notification links for tasks include taskId and taskTitle params. Contact page shows orange 'PENDING TASK' banner when accessed with taskTitle URL param.

backend_api.POST /api/tasks/{user_id} with contact_i: Creates task_created contact_event in contact's activity timeline
backend_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}: Returns task_created events with icon='checkbox-outline', color='#FF9500'
backend_api.GET /api/notification-center/{user_id}: Task notifications include taskId and taskTitle in their links
backend_api.Event type icons verified: task_created, task_completed, sms_failed, email_failed, lead_reassigned all have proper icon/color mappings

frontend_verified.NotificationBell mobile responsiveness: Dropdown uses maxWidth: 380 and scales with Math.min(380, window.innerWidth - 32) - tested on 390px and 320px viewports
frontend_verified.Contact page task banner: Shows orange 'PENDING TASK' banner when URL has taskTitle param, displays task title, has dismiss button
frontend_verified.Task banner dismiss: Clicking X button removes the banner and clears URL params
frontend_verified.Activity timeline task_created events: Show in timeline with 'Task Created' label and correct icon

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - does not send real SMS
mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCKED - Email fails in preview but contact_events are still created

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/test_contact_task_banner.png - Contact page with PENDING TASK banner
